cases.with_skill_prompt: phi-brainstorming I want to add a lightweight review queue to our FAQ workflow so editors can approve generated answers before publishing. Help me think through the design before we build it.
cases.without_skill_prompt: I want to add a lightweight review queue to our FAQ workflow so editors can approve generated answers before publishing. Help me think through the design before we build it.

cases.with_skill_prompt: The design is approved. Use phi-planning to break the FAQ review queue into an implementation plan with file targets, validation, and handoff.
cases.without_skill_prompt: The design is approved. Break the FAQ review queue into an implementation plan with file targets, validation, and handoff.

cases.with_skill_prompt: Use phi-tdd to add CSV export support to the Python CLI. I want a strict test-first flow.
cases.without_skill_prompt: Add CSV export support to the Python CLI. I want a strict test-first flow.

cases.with_skill_prompt: The backend route change is done. Use phi-verify before we claim it is complete.
cases.without_skill_prompt: The backend route change is done. Before we claim it is complete, tell me what to verify.
